title: Croatian Butter Cake
description: A traditional Croatian cake made with a buttery dough, crunchy topping and a hint of mirin.
instructions: Grease a 9-inch round cake pan and set aside.
In a large mixing bowl, cream the butter until light and fluffy.
Add the beaten egg and mix until well combined.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, sour cream and mirin.
Gradually add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture and mix until a dough forms.
Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch and place in the prepared cake pan.
Top with chopped almonds and bake for 35-40 minutes, or until golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool in the pan for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
